verses.text: Jesuh, Khrih hi, ci-in a um mi khempeuh Pasian' tate hi a, pa a it mi peuhmah in a ta zong a it hi
Pasian itin ama thupiakte i zuihna tawh Pasian tate a it ihihlam i kithei ding hi
Pasian i it ciangin ama thupiakte a zui ihi hi. Eite-a' dingin ama thupiakte zuihding a haksa lua hilo hi
Pasian' ta ahite peuhmah in leitung nate zo uh a, i upna tawh leitung nate tungah a gualzo ihi hi
Kuate in leitung nate zo ding ahi hiam i cih leh, Jesuh pen Pasian' Tapa hi, ci-in a umte bek in zo ding uh hi.

Hih Jesuh Khrih pen tui tawh kiphumna leh a sisan luangin sihna tawh a hong pai hi a, tui bek tawh a hong pai hiloin tui leh sisan tawh a hong pai ahi hi. Kha mahmah in hih thu a manna teci a pang hi. Kha pen thuman gen ahi hi
Hih thu-ah teci a pang thum om a
tuate pen Kha, tui, leh sisan ahi uh hi. Hih thumte' teci pan'na kibang kim hi
Mihingte' teci pan'na sangthei ihih leh Pasian' teci pan'na i san'theih ding thupizaw hi. Pasian in ama Tapa' thu tu-a bangin teci hong pang hi

Tua ahih manin Pasian' Tapa a um mi peuhmah in Pasian' teci pan'na a sang ahi hi. Ahi zongin Pasian' thugen a umlo mi peuhmah in ama Tapa thu teci pangin a gennate a umlo uh ahih manin Pasian pen zuaugen a suaksak ahi uh hi
Tu-in Pasian' teci pan'na in: Pasian in ama Tapa tung tawnin eite tungah nuntak tawntungna a hong pia hi
Pasian' Tapa tawh a kipawl peuhmah in nuntak tawntungna nei a, Pasian' Tapa tawh a kipawllote in nuntak tawntungna neilo uh hi, cihna ahi hi.
Pasian' Tapa a um mite in nuntak tawntungna a nei na hih lamtak uh na theihna dingun hih lai a hong gelh ka hi hi
Eite in ama deihna tawh kituakin i nget nak leh i nget khempeuh Pasian in hong piading hi, ci-in kimuan'na lungsim i nei hi
Eite' ngetna khempeuh amah in na za hi, ci-in thei ihih manin ama kiang panin i nget khempeuh zong hong piading hi, ci-in i thei hi

Mi khatpeuh in a Khristian mipihte a sihna ding zah ciang a hilo mawhna a gamta a muh leh ama-a' dingin thu ngetsak ta hen. Ama thungetna bangin Pasian in a nuntakna suksaklo ding hi. Hih pen sihna zah ciang mawhna a hilote ka cihna ahi hi. Ahi zongin sihna ding zah ciang ahi mawhna om a, tuate-a' ding ngetsak un, a ci ka hi kei hi
Gamtat khialhna khempeuh mawhna hi a, ahi zongin mawhna khempeuh in sihna ciangdong piangsak khinlo hi
Pasian' tate in mawhna bawbawllo uh hi. Pasian' Tapa in amaute kem a, Dawimangpa in amaute susia zolo hi
Leitung midang khempeuh Dawimangpa' khutsungah a om ahi zongin eite pen Pasian' mi ihihna thu i thei hi

Pasian' Tapa hong pai-in eite thu hong theisak ahih manin Pasian taktak a thei ihihna thu i thei hi. A Tapa Jesuh Khrih tawh i kipawlna hangin Pasian taktak mah tawh a kipawlthei ihi hi. Tua Jesuh pen Pasian taktak mah hi a, nuntak tawntungna a piathei ahi hi
Ka itte aw, milim na biakkhak lohna dingun na kidawm un.
